title: Mould cleanup stop conditions
summary: Identify water source, affected area, porous materials, ventilation, protective equipment, and vulnerable occupants before cleaning.
content: Identify water source, affected area, porous materials, ventilation, protective equipment, and vulnerable occupants before cleaning. Use professional or official guidance for large areas, sewage, hidden growth, HVAC contamination, repeated return, or severe symptoms. Do not dry-brush, sand, or spread contaminated dust through occupied rooms.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Mould cleanup stop conditions”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Mould cleanup stop conditions»
steps: Identify water source, affected area, porous materials, ventilation, protective equipment, and vulnerable occupants before cleaning.
Use professional or official guidance for large areas, sewage, hidden growth, HVAC contamination, repeated return, or severe symptoms.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Mould cleanup stop conditions.

warnings: Do not dry-brush, sand, or spread contaminated dust through occupied rooms.

common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Mould cleanup stop conditions.

alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Mould cleanup stop conditions.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Mould cleanup stop conditions.

when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Mould cleanup stop conditions.
short_term: For Mould cleanup stop conditions, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Mould cleanup stop conditions, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Mould cleanup stop conditions, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Mould cleanup stop conditions to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
